title: Evensong
content:
Lay away the story, - 
        Though the theme is sweet,
     There's a lack of something yet,
        Leaves it incomplete: - 
     There's a nameless yearning - 
        Strangely undefined - 
     For a story sweeter still
        Than the written kind.

     Therefore read no longer - 
        I've no heart to hear
     But just something you make up,
        O my mother dear. - 
     With your arms around me,
        Hold me, folded-eyed, - 
     Only let your voice go on - 
        I'll be satisfied.
meaning:
"Evensong" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
